steps.title: Identify the antecedent
steps.content: The blank modifies “eight panels of text” in the prepositional phrase beginning with “With.” The sentence's subject—“the poems”—is the antecedent for this possessive determiner.

steps.title: Apply pronoun-antecedent agreement
steps.content: ”The poems” is plural, so the possessive must be plural: “their”. The forms “it's” and “they're” are contractions (meaning “it is” and “they are”) and do not function as possessive determiners; “its” is a singular possessive and fails to agree with the plural antecedent. That matches choice A — A is correct.
